name: UBA : MaaS360 URL access blocked
notes: Device accessed a blocked URL via MaaS Secure Browser App
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of IBM MaaS360 Security
when an event matches all of the following BB:UBA : Common Event Filters
when any of Event ID match BLOCKED_URL_ACCESS
when any of Event Category match VULNERABILITY
